title: Error: No SQL generated, /genSql does not support driver option <Option> as specified in the assignment file, [DRIVER_SETTINGS], USYS$<DB>_PARAMS.
breadcrumbs: Error: No SQL generated, /genSql does not support driver option <Option> as specified in the assignment file, [DRIVER_SETTINGS], USYS$<DB>_PARAMS.
text: Error: No SQL generated, /genSql does not support driver option <Option> as specified in the assignment file, [DRIVER_SETTINGS], USYS$ <DB> _PARAMS. A connector option specified for the target DBMS is not supported by /gensql . For example, if you specified USYS$ORA_params = upgrade packages , no create table scripts are generated. Explanation The /gensql command does not support deprecated connector options that were used in older versions of Uniface when upgrading an existing table rather than creating new tables. Oracle (ORA): upgrade packages Sybase (SYB): upgrade upgrade dpl upgrade apl upgrade locks upgrade procs Related Links /genSql The /genSql switch generates DBMS-specific SQL command scripts for preparing an application database or the Uniface Repository, including creating tables and enforcing referential integrity constraints in the database.
